name: Cheese Mushroom Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ground beef, oatmeal, eggs, and 1 tablespoon of salt in a large bowl. Mix well.
2. In another bowl, combine the remaining ingredients for the filling (mushrooms, breadcrumbs, cheese, and additional salt).
3. Form the meat mixture into patties and flatten them slightly.
4. Add a spoonful of the mushroom mixture to each patty and shape them into balls.
5. Heat some oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Brown the meatballs on all sides.
6. In a separate bowl, mix 1 cup tomato juice and 1 can cream of mushroom soup.
7. Pour the tomato juice and soup mixture over the meatballs.
8. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 3/4 hour, stirring occasionally until heated through.
